title: Geometry Dash
shortDescription: Jump and fly your way through danger in this rhythm-based action platformer!
detailedDescriptionHtml:
Jump and fly your way through danger in this rhythm-based action platformer!

Prepare for a near impossible challenge in the world of Geometry Dash. Push your skills to the limit as you jump, fly and flip your way through dangerous passages and spiky obstacles.

Game Features


  • Rhythm-based Action Platforming!
  • Lots of levels with unique soundtracks!
  • Build and share your own levels using the level editor!
  • Thousands of high quality user generated levels!
  • Unlock new icons and colors to customize your character!
  • Fly rockets, flip gravity and much more!
  • Use practice mode to sharpen your skills!
  • Lots of achievements and rewards!
  • Challenge yourself with the near impossible!
  • Steam users get two exclusive unlockable icons!

pcRequirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS *: Windows XP
  • Processor: 2.0+ GHz
  • Memory: 512 MB RAM
  • Graphics: OpenGL 2.0 support
  • Storage: 100 MB available space

macRequirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: Mac OS X 10.7
  • Processor: 2.0+ GHz
  • Memory: 512 MB RAM
  • Graphics: OpenGL 2.0 support
  • Storage: 100 MB available space

newsItems.title: GeometryDash.com is Live!
newsItems.author: RobTop Games
newsItems.contents: [p][url="https://t.co/aGw9LKrD6o"]GeometryDash.com[/url] is live! Play Stereo Madness for free in your browser, explore news, check the Top 1000 leaderboards and more :) /RubRub[/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/7432088/a724197eee9f3af13c6ca5d86e41653749f05ea2.png"][/img][/p]

newsItems.title: The Geometry Dash Awards 2025: Winners
newsItems.author: RobTop Games
newsItems.contents: [p]The winners of The Geometry Dash Awards 2025 have been decided! [/p][p]Watch the video to see the best that Geometry Dash had to offer in 2025.[/p][p][/p][previewyoutube="gU2VMt0UVJ0;full"][/previewyoutube]

newsItems.title: The Geometry Dash Awards 2025: Nominees
newsItems.author: RobTop Games
newsItems.contents: [p]The nominees for The Geometry Dash Awards 2025 have been announced![/p][p]Vote to decide the winners [url="https://robtopgames.com/vote"]here[/url]. [/p][p][/p][p]Before voting, you can watch the video below to see all the nominees. You can also find lists of all the nominated levels under "Top Lists" in-game.[/p][p][/p][previewyoutube="V-mMeI8aq4U;full"][/previewyoutube]

newsItems.title: Update 2.2081
newsItems.author: RobTop Games
newsItems.contents:
This update includes some tweaks to Click Between / On Steps, performance improvements, and various bugfixes.

Before reporting any bugs, make sure that you have fully uninstalled any third-party unofficial extensions, as they can cause unexpected behavior.

/RubRub
